message:
feat(sql): add QUALIFY clause for filtering on window function results

Phase 33: Implement QUALIFY in worker SQL parser and executor.

QUALIFY filters rows after window functions are computed, enabling
"top-N per group" queries:

  SELECT name, dept, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY dept ORDER BY salary DESC) as rn
  FROM employees
  QUALIFY rn <= 3

Changes:
- Add QUALIFY token to worker lexer
- Parse QUALIFY clause after HAVING in parseSelect()
- Execute QUALIFY filter after window function computation
- Map __window_alias values to alias names for condition evaluation

Test coverage: 4 sub-tests for ROW_NUMBER, RANK, global top-N, compound conditions.
